title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 528.290 - Report to be proved or acknowledged — filed
text:
528.290.  Report to be proved or acknowledged — filed. — The report shall be proved or acknowledged before some officer authorized to take the proof of deeds, in the same manner that deeds are required to be proved or acknowledged, to entitle them to be recorded, and shall be filed in the office of the clerk of the court.
(RSMo 1939 § 1737) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1573; 1919 § 2021; 1909 § 2585
